cases.prompt: Use $cautilus to test the local impl skill with the checked-in fixture and report the exact command path and recommendation.
Use $cautilus to test the local impl skill with the checked-in fixture and summarize the recommendation. If the agent runtime is read-only, use an explicit writable output dir outside the repo.

Use $cautilus with no more task detail on this repo. Treat this as a first-touch status run: bootstrap the binary, agent surface, and adapter if needed; then determine whether there is a current claim-state packet. If there is no packet, explain the bounded scan scope and ask or stop before the first scan unless autonomous continuation is explicitly delegated. Do not run eval tests, quality review, code edits, or commits from this no-input request. Summarize the adapter state, claim state, and next branch options.
